name: Medical Unit
description: Provides 24/7 basic medical services, pharmacy access, patient beds, and emergency ambulance transport. Qualified doctors are available for general consultations and first-aid treatment for students and staff.
location: Located near Hostel 1 and the staff quarters, along the medical road.
timings: Open 24 hours daily (Emergency services); General OPD: 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM and 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

name: Central Cafeteria
description: Offers hot meals, regional Indian snacks, beverages, and dessert choices at subsidized rates. Features a large seating hall accommodating up to 300 students, popular for group discussions and casual dining.
location: Located behind the Main Administrative Building, near the Lecture Hall Complex.

name: Nescafe Outlet
description: A popular student hangout spot serving hot/cold coffee, maggi noodles, iced teas, and quick bites. Known for late-night student discussions and group study sessions.
location: Situated in the courtyard between the CSE Department and the Central Library.

name: SBI Bank Branch
description: Full-service branch of State Bank of India offering student accounts, education loan applications, fee payment processing, and general banking services.
location: Located near the Administrative Building annex, opposite the Guest House road.
timings: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM (Monday to Saturday, closed on 2nd & 4th Saturdays)

name: SBI ATM
description: Two 24/7 cash dispensing machines with support for cash withdrawal, balance inquiries, and PIN changes. Accessible to all students and staff.
location: Situated right next to the SBI Bank Branch building near the main road.

name: Placement and Training Cell
description: Coordinates campus recruitment drives, company presentations, and mock interview prep. It contains presentation halls, group discussion chambers, and interview cabins for visiting recruiters.
location: Housed on the first floor of the Main Administrative Building, Wing B.

name: Campus Gymnasium
description: Equipped with treadmills, weightlifting machines, dumbbells, and cardiovascular trainers. Experienced trainers are on duty to guide students with workouts and general fitness advice.
location: Located inside the Main Sports Complex building, adjacent to the basketball court.
timings: 6:00 AM - 9:00 AM & 5:00 PM - 8:30 PM (Closed on Sundays)

name: Indoor Sports Hall
description: Features multiple high-quality badminton courts, table tennis tables, carrom boards, and chess corners. It hosts inter-hostel and annual state-level tournaments.
location: Located inside the Sports Complex near the main stadium entrance.

name: Student Store
description: Sells textbooks, engineering drawing boards, reference materials, mattresses, pillows, buckets, and essential toiletries. Ideal for first-year hostel settlers.
location: Situated in the shopping arcade near the staff colony gate.

name: Stationery and Xerox Center
description: Provides high-speed photocopying, thesis binding, printing, and general stationery sales like notebooks, calculators, charts, and laboratory record files.
location: Located adjacent to the Central Library entrance.
